minimum_input: future rainfall/heat exposure constructed from verified geography and interview timing
pass_rule: future shocks do not predict current UHC outcomes after the chosen controls
blocking_gap: requires constructed outcomes, climate-linked data, and a primary reduced-form estimate
interpretation_if_fails: downgrade climate estimates to weak/descriptive association

pass_rule: sign and magnitude are not driven by a single arbitrary lag
blocking_gap: requires constructed outcomes, climate-linked data, and a primary reduced-form estimate
interpretation_if_fails: report instability and avoid a single-window causal claim

minimum_input: CHIRPS, ERA5-Land, NASA POWER, TerraClimate, or SPEI source variants as appropriate
pass_rule: core result is not an artifact of one climate product
blocking_gap: requires constructed outcomes, climate-linked data, and a primary reduced-form estimate

minimum_input: verified interview month/date and survey timing controls
pass_rule: results remain after survey-month or fieldwork-season controls
blocking_gap: requires constructed outcomes, climate-linked data, and a primary reduced-form estimate
interpretation_if_fails: do not interpret shock timing as causal

minimum_input: verified admin, cluster, or panel geography identifiers
pass_rule: estimates are not explained by time-invariant local geography
blocking_gap: requires constructed outcomes, climate-linked data, and a primary reduced-form estimate

minimum_input: verified clustering level and sufficient clusters
pass_rule: inference survives design-appropriate clustering or survey variance treatment
blocking_gap: requires constructed outcomes, climate-linked data, and a primary reduced-form estimate
interpretation_if_fails: report uncertainty as too fragile for inference

minimum_input: at least two raw-verified countries in the estimation sample
pass_rule: pooled estimate is not driven by one country
blocking_gap: requires constructed outcomes, climate-linked data, and a primary reduced-form estimate

minimum_input: verified survey weights, strata, and PSU variables where available
pass_rule: weighted and unweighted/design-adjusted conclusions are consistent enough to interpret
blocking_gap: requires constructed outcomes, climate-linked data, and a primary reduced-form estimate
interpretation_if_fails: report design sensitivity and avoid precise pooled claims

minimum_input: defensible outcome unlikely to respond to climate shocks
pass_rule: placebo outcome is not predicted by climate shock
blocking_gap: requires constructed outcomes, climate-linked data, and a primary reduced-form estimate
interpretation_if_fails: suspect omitted seasonality, geography, or survey artifacts

minimum_input: pre-specified group with weak expected shock channel and sufficient sample size
pass_rule: effect is weaker or absent in the negative-control group
blocking_gap: requires constructed outcomes, climate-linked data, and a primary reduced-form estimate

minimum_input: point/cluster coordinates and admin geography that can both be linked
pass_rule: conclusions are not driven by exposure aggregation level
blocking_gap: requires constructed outcomes, climate-linked data, and a primary reduced-form estimate
interpretation_if_fails: report exposure measurement error and lower causal confidence

minimum_input: pre-specified outcome, exposure, subgroup, and lag family
pass_rule: key findings survive an explicit multiple-testing adjustment or are labeled exploratory
blocking_gap: requires constructed outcomes, climate-linked data, and a primary reduced-form estimate
interpretation_if_fails: do not present exploratory significant results as confirmatory
